overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a foggy night walk through a neon-lit urban downtown. The player moves from a multi-lane street under an elevated highway onto the sidewalk, passing futuristic vehicles and approaching pedestrians amid towering buildings with holographic advertisements.

events.description: yellow sports car speeds past on the left side of the road
camera turns right toward the sidewalk edge

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet asphalt street under the overpass, observing passing traffic and neon billboards

notable_agents.action: yellow sports car speeding past on the left lane

entered.detail: large concrete overpass structure spanning the street with attached digital billboards
multiple illuminated holographic advertisements on the left building facade
rain-slicked black asphalt reflecting pink and green neon lights
metal safety barrier along the right edge of the road

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy neon-lit street beneath a massive elevated highway. The camera moves forward along wet asphalt, passing under the overpass structure while a yellow sports car speeds by on the left. Digital billboards illuminate the scene with pink and cyan light as the camera approaches the right sidewalk.

events.description: steps from asphalt road onto concrete sidewalk

agents.ego_description: transitioning from the street onto the sidewalk, continuing forward under the overpass

entered.detail: wet concrete pavement with red painted edge line
digital speed limit display showing '40' mounted on a pole
large cylindrical support column for the overpass structure

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions from the street onto the concrete sidewalk, passing a speed limit sign and concrete support pillar. The elevated highway continues overhead while the metal railing now runs along the right edge. The foggy atmosphere persists with street lamps visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with digital signage and street lighting

events.description: pedestrians become visible walking in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk approaching a group of distant pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of people walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall pole with multiple digital screens displaying animated advertisements
tall street light illuminating the foggy air with white light
public waste bin on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the sidewalk, the overpass recedes to the right revealing more of the foggy sky. Digital advertisement poles and street lamps line the path. A group of pedestrians appears in the distance walking toward the camera, and a tall building becomes visible on the left horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense urban sidewalk with tall neon-lit skyscrapers

events.description: passing through group of pedestrians on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking through a group of pedestrians while approaching a tall building with prominent pink neon lighting

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking directly toward the camera
pedestrian in orange top walking alongside

entered.detail: skyscraper with prominent vertical pink neon light strips on the facade

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches and passes through a group of pedestrians on the sidewalk. A massive skyscraper with striking vertical pink neon lights dominates the left side of the frame. The overpass and railing have passed out of view, opening up the scene to reveal more of the dense urban environment ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered street beneath a massive overpass into the open, neon-drenched expanse of a futuristic downtown. It begins on wet asphalt under the shadow of an elevated highway, gliding past a speeding yellow sports car amidst the pink and cyan glow of digital billboards. As the camera transitions onto the concrete sidewalk, it passes a speed limit sign and support pillars while the highway continues to loom overhead. The scene then opens up as the overpass recedes to the right, revealing a foggy sky and distant pedestrians walking toward the camera along a path lined with advertisement poles. Finally, the camera moves through the crowd of pedestrians as the environment expands, bringing a massive skyscraper with striking vertical pink neon lights into dominant view.
